data.biography: Charles Joel Nordström Kinnaman (born 25 November 1979) is a Swedish-American actor who first gained recognition for his roles in the Swedish film Easy Money and the Johan Falk crime series. Kinnaman is known internationally for his television roles as Detective Stephen Holder in AMC's The Killing, Takeshi Kovacs in the first season of Altered Carbon, and Governor Will Conway in the U.S. version of House of Cards. He has also played Alex Murphy in the 2014 RoboCop remake, and Rick Flag in the Warner Bros. film adaptations of the DC Comics anti-hero team Suicide Squad (2016), as well as James Gunn's 2021 sequel/soft reboot, The Suicide Squad. Since 2019, he has starred as NASA astronaut Ed Baldwin in the Apple TV+ science fiction drama series For All Mankind.
data.name: Joel Kinnaman

data.biography:
Joel Kinnaman (nome artístico de Charles Joel Nordström; Estocolmo, 25 de Novembro de 1979) é um ator sueco radicado nos Estados Unidos. Na Suécia, ficou conhecido com o papel principal no filme Snabba cash, o qual o rendeu um prêmio de melhor ator no festival Guldbagge, e por seu papel como Frank Wagner na série de filmes Johan Falk. Logo se mudou para os EUA, onde Kinnaman ganhou fama com a série de televisão The Killing e filmes como RoboCop (2014),"Esquadrão Suicida (2016)" e fez o candidato a Presidência, Conway, na 4° temporada da série original Netflix, "House of Cards (2016)".

Joel começou sua carreira no ano de 2002,[5] tendo cursado a academia sueca de teatro por cinco anos. Em 2007, uma ambiciosa adaptação para os palcos de Crime e Castigo garantiu a Kinnaman prestígio em seu país. Daí partiu uma concorrida carreira no cinema, incluindo vários filmes da série policial Johan Falk.  Porém foi no ano de 2010 que sua carreira cinematográfica despontou, ao estrelar o filme sueco Snabba cash, onde atraiu a atenção de Hollywood. Para ajudar a alavancar sua carreira na América do Norte ele contratou o mesmo agente de Johnny Depp. Todo o esforço deu certo e em dezembro de 2010 Kinnaman começava a participar de seu primeiro filme americano, The Darkest Hour. Este foi lançado em 2011 junto com outra produção em que Kinnaman atuou, The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo, adaptação de um romance sueco. Posteriormente foi contratado pela rede AMC para estrelar a série The Killing, no papel do detetive Stephen Holder.

No ano de 2012 Kinnaman participou de Safe House, estreia em Hollywood do diretor de Snabba cash Daniel Espinosa, e foi confirmado para o papel de Alex Murphy/Robocop no remake do filme Robocop dirigido pelo brasileiro José Padilha. A produção foi lançada em 2014.Em 2016 estrelou,junto de diversos atores,o filme da DC Comics Esquadrão Suicida, no papel do Coronel Rick Flag.

Charles Joel Nordström Kinnaman, más conocido como Joel Kinnaman (Estocolmo, 25 de noviembre de 1979), es un actor sueco-estadounidense de cine y televisión. Se dio a conocer por interpretar el papel principal en la película sueca Easy Money y por su papel de Frank Wagner en la serie de televisión Johan Falk, un papel por el que fue nominado al Premio Guldbagge​ en la categoría de mejor actor secundario. Del 2011 al 2014 protagonizó la serie de la AMC y Netflix The Killing en el papel del detective Stephen Holder.

data.biography:
Charles Joel Nordström 1979. november 25-én született Stockholmban, Svédországban. Svéd származású édesanyja terapeuta, édesapja, Steve Kinnaman pedig amerikai származású, aki a vietnámi háború során dezertált a hadseregtől. Joelnek svéd és amerikai állampolgársága is van, és folyékonyan beszéli mind a két nyelvet 5 lánytestvérével egyetemben.

Kinnaman a Den osynlige (2002) című filmmel kezdte színészi karrierjét, amely után beiratkozott a malmöi svéd drámaiskolába, ahol 2007-ben végzett, és szinte rögtön felhívta magára a svéd média figyelmét a Bűn és bűnhődés egyik színpadi adaptációjával.

Ez idő alatt olyan filmekben tűnt fel, mint a Vihar (2005), az Arn: Riket vid vägens slut (2008), a Johan Falk: Kiemelt ügyek csoportja (2009) és a sorozat 5 további része.

A nemzetközi kiugrást az Instant dohány (2010) főszerepe hozta meg számára, amely után már az Egyesült Államokban is elkezdtek érdeklődni a színész iránt. Kinnaman fogadott egy amerikai ügynököt, és sorban kapta a további szerepeket. Játszott a Gyilkosság (2010) című sorozatban, A legsötétebb óra (2011) és a Védhetetlen (2012) című filmekben is. Utóbbit az Instant dohány direktora, Daniel Espinoza rendezte.

Abban az évben ismét szerepelt 6 Johan Falk-filmben, majd megkapta a Robotzsaru (2014) feldolgozás címszerepét. Ezt követően olyan produkciókban tűnt fel, mint a Knight of Cups (2014) és a Éjszakai hajsza (2015), illetve szerepet kapott a világháborús drámában, a A 44. gyermek (2015) című filmben is.

乔尔·金纳曼（Joel Kinnaman），1979年11月25日出生于瑞典斯德哥尔摩，具有瑞典和美国双国籍，演员。

1990年在瑞典连续剧《Storstad》里饰演了Felix Lundström这个角色  。2002年出演自己电影处女作《鬼焰》，片中饰演了Kalle  。2009年开始在《瑞典特警》系列电影里出演主角Frank Wagner  。2010年在瑞典电影《不义之财》中饰演主角JW并凭借这部电影获得金甲虫奖最佳男演员奖  。2011年在电影《至暗之时》中担任主演Skyler  ；同年在AMC的罪案剧《谋杀》中饰演Stephen Holder  。2012年因为连续剧《谋杀》获得了第38届土星奖最佳电视男配角的提名  。2014年在索尼公司科幻动作片《机械战警》中饰演男主角机械战警墨菲  。
data.name: 乔尔·金纳曼

data.biography: Urodził się w Sztokholmie, w Szwecji. Jego matka, Szwedka Dee Kinnaman, miała pochodzenie żydowskie (wywodziła się od ukraińskich imigrantów żydowskich). Z kolei jego ojciec, Steve Kinnaman, urodził się w Ameryce i miał niemieckie, angielskie, szkockie i irlandzkie pochodzenie; opuścił Stany Zjednoczone po wojnie wietnamskiej. Joel dorastał z pięcioma siostrami, dwie z nich zostały zawodowymi aktorkami. Przez jeden rok chodził do szkoły w Teksasie. Swoją karierę rozpoczął w 2002 roku, uczęszczając przez pięć lat do szwedzkiej akademii teatralnej Malmö Theatre Academy. Pojawił się gościnnie w serialu Storstad (1990) jako Felix Lundström, a następnie wystąpił w roli poety Niklasa w dreszczowcu fantasy Niewidzialny (Den osynlige, 2002). W Szwecji stał się znany z roli Franka Wagnera w serialu Johan Falk (2009), a także jako Johan „JW” Westlund, który wiedzie podwójne życie: raz jest zwykłym studentem, raz podejmującym najważniejsze decyzje przestępcą, w dramacie Szybki cash (Snabba Cash, 2010). Za tę rolę odebrał nagrodę Guldbagge dla najlepszego aktora[6] i przyciągnął uwagę Hollywood. Wkrótce przeniósł się do USA, gdzie zyskał sławę dzięki roli Stephena Holdera w serialu kryminalnym Dochodzenie (2011–2014), za którą był nominowany do Nagrody Saturn w kategorii najlepszy drugoplanowy aktor telewizyjny. Od 2018 gra główną rolę w serialu telewizyjnym Altered Carbon.

喬爾·金納曼（Joel Kinnaman），1979 年 11 月 25 日出生於瑞典斯德哥爾摩，具有瑞典和美國雙國籍，演員。

1990 年在瑞典聯續劇《Storstad》裏飾演了 Felix Lundström 這個角色 。2002 年出演自己電影處女作《鬼焰》，片中飾演了 Kalle 。2009 年開始在《瑞典特警》系列電影裏出演主角 Frank Wagner 。2010 年在瑞典電影《不義之財》中飾演主角 JW 並憑藉這部電影獲得金甲蟲獎最佳男演員獎 。2011 年在電影《世紀末光煞》中擔任主演 Skyler ；同年在 AMC 的罪案劇《謀殺》中飾演 Stephen Holder 。2012 年因為聯續劇《謀殺》獲得了第 38 屆土星獎最佳電視男配角的提名 。2014 年在索尼公司科幻動作片《鐵甲威龍 2014》中飾演男主角機械戰警墨菲 。
data.name: 喬爾·金納曼

data.biography:
Charles Joel Nordström Kinnaman, 25 Kasım 1979 tarihinde İsveç'in Stockholm şehrinde dünyaya gelmiştir. Amerikalı bir baba ve İsveçli bir annenin oğlu olan Kinnaman, hem İsveç hem de Amerikan vatandaşlığına sahiptir. Bu durum, kariyerini her iki kıtada da şekillendirmesine olanak tanımıştır.

Oyunculuk kariyerine İsveç'te başlayan Kinnaman, uluslararası alanda dikkatleri üzerine çeken ilk büyük çıkışını, "Snabba Cash" (Easy Money) (2010) adlı İsveç yapımı filmle yaptı. Bu filmdeki başrol performansı, ona eleştirel beğeni kazandırdı ve Hollywood'un kapılarını araladı.

Amerika'daki ilk önemli başarısını, AMC'nin sevilen dizisi "The Killing"de (2011-2014) canlandırdığı dedektif 'Stephen Holder' karakteriyle elde etti. Bu rol, onun Amerika pazarında tanınan ve saygı duyulan bir aktör olmasını sağladı. Televizyon kariyerindeki başarısını, Netflix'in popüler bilimkurgu dizisi "Altered Carbon"da (2018) başrol oynayarak ve Apple TV+'ın büyük beğeni toplayan dizisi "For All Mankind"de (2019-günümüz) astronot 'Edward Baldwin' karakterine hayat vererek sürdürdü.

Sinema kariyerinde ise ilk büyük başrolünü, yeniden çevrim olan "RoboCop" (2014) filmiyle üstlendi. DC Evreni'nde geçen "Suicide Squad" (2016) ve James Gunn'ın yönettiği "The Suicide Squad: İntihar Timi" (2021) filmlerinde canlandırdığı 'Albay Rick Flag' karakteriyle de geniş kitlelere ulaştı. Ayrıca John Woo'nun yönettiği diyalogsuz aksiyon filmi "Silent Night" (2023) gibi projelerde de yer almıştır.

Genellikle canlandırdığı sert, kararlı ve çatışma içindeki karakterlerle tanınan Joel Kinnaman, hem televizyonda hem de sinemada aksiyon ve dram türlerinde aranan bir başrol oyuncusu olarak kariyerini sürdürmektedir.

Charles Joel Nordström Kinnaman (geboren am 25. November 1979) ist ein schwedisch-amerikanischer Schauspieler, der erstmals durch seine Rollen im schwedischen Film Easy Money und in der Krimiserie Johan Falk bekannt wurde. International ist Kinnaman vor allem für seine Fernsehrollen als Detective Stephen Holder in The Killing (AMC), Takeshi Kovacs in der ersten Staffel von Altered Carbon und Gouverneur Will Conway in der US-Version von House of Cards bekannt. Außerdem spielte er Alex Murphy im RoboCop-Remake von 2014 sowie Rick Flag in den Warner-Bros.-Filmadaptionen des DC-Comics-Antiheldenteams Suicide Squad (2016) und in James Gunns Fortsetzung/Soft-Reboot The Suicide Squad (2021). Seit 2019 verkörpert er den NASA-Astronauten Ed Baldwin in der Science-Fiction-Drama-Serie For All Mankind auf Apple TV+.

スウェーデン・ストックホルム出身。名門スウェーデン・アカデミック・スクール・オブ・ドラマを卒業し、02年に俳優としてのキャリアをスタート。ベストセラー小説をダニエル・エスピノーサ監督が3部作として映画化した1作目「イージーマネー」（10／日本劇場未公開）で、スウェーデンのアカデミー賞にあたるグルドバッゲ賞の主演男優賞を受賞する。その後、米国に渡りハリウッド大作に出演する機会を探すうち、デンマークのヒットドラマをリメイクした「THE KILLING 闇に眠る少女」（DVDタイトル「キリング　26日間」）で、ミレイユ・イーノス演じる主人公の相棒となる刑事役に抜てきされる。以後、デビッド・フィンチャー監督の「ドラゴン・タトゥーの女」（11）やエスピノーサ監督のハリウッド進出作「デンジャラス・ラン」（12）を経て、リメイク版「ロボコップ」（14）で主演を務める。その後も「イージーマネー」の続編2本をはじめ、テレンス・マリック監督の「Knight of Cups（原題）」（14）などに出演。エスピノーサ監督とは「チャイルド44（原題）」（14）でも顔を合わせる。
data.name: ジョエル・キナマン

data.biography:
François Levantal est un acteur français, né le 14 octobre 1960 à Paris (France).

Le père de François Levantal était avocat. Sa famille avait une maison de campagne à Brunoy dans l'Essonne, commune à laquelle il était très attaché. Levantal a fréquenté 16 écoles différentes et n'a pas eu le diplôme du baccalauréat. Il a toujours eu une passion pour la musique et passe énormément de temps à chanter ou jouer de la guitare.

En 1978, il suit la formation du Cours Simon et a comme amis Mathieu Kassovitz et Vincent Cassel. En 1980, il intègre la troupe de Jean-Louis Barrault au théâtre du Rond-Point. Il fait ses premiers pas au cinéma dans les années 1980 avec quelques petits rôles. En 1986, il joue dans le film Conseil de famille de Costa-Gavras.

Le premier rôle pour lequel le public le reconnaît et qui lui a servi de tremplin est celui d'Astérix dans La Haine de Mathieu Kassovitz en 1995. Plusieurs articles ont été écrits sur ce petit rôle marquant, dont un en 2015 intitulé «20 ans après La Haine, François Levantal se souvient».  Dès lors, Levantal va enchaîner les seconds rôles marquants. Il est demandé par la nouvelle génération de cinéastes des années 1990: Jan Kounen (Dobermann), Jacques Audiard (Un héros très discret), Olivier Marchal (Gangsters)... En 2000, il retrouve Kassovitz pour Les Rivières pourpres. Puis il tourne pour Zabou Breitman (Se souvenir des belles choses) et Jean-Pierre Jeunet (Un long dimanche de fiançailles). Il n'hésite pas à varier les genres, passant du drame au film policier, sans oublier la comédie (L'Amour aux trousses avec Jean Dujardin, L'Entente cordiale avec Christian Clavier, Camping ou les films de Franck Gastambide).

Pendant la saison 2003, il a joué un des avocats du cabinet Zelder dans la série télévisée Avocats et Associés. En 2006, dans le téléfilm L'Affaire Pierre Chanal, il incarne l'adjudant Pierre Chanal, suspect des meurtres des disparus de Mourmelon.

Toujours en 2006, il met en scène le one-man-show de Nicolas Koretzky.

En 2009, Alexandre Astier lui confie le rôle du bras droit d'un sénateur romain qui apparaît régulièrement dans la sixième saison de la série Kaamelott. À partir de 2015, il interprète l'un des rôles principaux de la série La Petite Histoire de France, produite par Jamel Debbouze.

En 2014, il s'illustre au théâtre des Nouveautés, avec Élie Semoun et Laurent Gamelon, dans l'adaptation théâtrale du film Le Placard, écrite et mise en scène par Francis Veber.

François Levantal est père d'une fille, Gina Levantal, née en 1999.

En 2022, il joue dans Big Bug, de Jean-Pierre Jeunet, un personnage de cyborg.

Source: Article "François Levantal" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Xu Ziyin, internationally known as Roada Xu, is a Chinese singer from T Entertainment.

As a teenager, she passed trainee auditions for CUBE, JYP and SM, but did not sign as a trainee. She graduated from Beijing Film Academy. In 2018, she participated in her first singing and dancing TV competition, and made her actress debut a year later. data.biography:
John Michael "Ozzy" Osbourne (3 December 1948 – 22 July 2025) was an English singer, songwriter, and media personality. He rose to prominence during the 1970s as the lead singer of the heavy metal band Black Sabbath, during which period he adopted the nickname "Prince of Darkness".

Osbourne became a founding member of Black Sabbath in 1968, providing lead vocals from their eponymous debut studio album in 1970 to Never Say Die! in 1978. The band was highly influential in the development of heavy metal music, in particular their critically acclaimed releases Paranoid (1970), Master of Reality (1971), and Sabbath Bloody Sabbath (1973). Osbourne was fired from Black Sabbath in 1979 due to problems with alcohol and other drugs. He then began a successful solo career with Blizzard of Ozz in 1980 and released 13 studio albums, the first seven of which received multi-platinum certifications in the US. He reunited with Black Sabbath on several occasions. He rejoined in 1997 and helped record the group's final studio album, 13 (2013), before they embarked on a farewell tour that ended with a 2017 performance in their native Birmingham.

Osbourne sold over 100 million albums, including his solo work and Black Sabbath releases. He was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame as a member of Black Sabbath in 2006 and as a solo artist in 2024. He was also inducted into the UK Music Hall of Fame both solo and with Black Sabbath in 2005. He was honoured with stars on the Hollywood Walk of Fame and Birmingham Walk of Stars. At the 2014 MTV Europe Music Awards, he received the Global Icon Award. In 2015, he received the Ivor Novello Award for Lifetime Achievement from the British Academy of Songwriters, Composers and Authors.

In the early 2000s, Osbourne's career expanded to a new medium when he became a star in his own reality show, The Osbournes, alongside wife/manager Sharon and two of their three children, Kelly and Jack. He co-starred with Jack and Kelly in the television series Ozzy & Jack's World Detour. On 5 July 2025, Osbourne performed his final show at the Back to the Beginning concert event amid ongoing health battles, having announced earlier in the year that this would be his last live performance, though he intended to continue recording music. He died later that month on 22 July 2025.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Ozzy Osbourne, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia
data.name: Ozzy Osbourne

data.biography:
John Michael Osbourne, surnommé Ozzy, né le 3 décembre 1948 à Aston (en) (Birmingham), est un chanteur britannique de heavy metal. Il est surnommé The Prince of Darkness (« Le prince des ténèbres », en français) en référence aux frasques de sa vie privée et de ses prestations sur scène2. Il est connu à la fois pour sa carrière musicale en solo qui se poursuit toujours, ainsi que comme chanteur au sein de Black Sabbath, l'un des groupes fondateurs du heavy metal et créateur du titre emblématique War Pigs (1970).

En 2002, l'émission de téléréalité consacrée à la vie quotidienne d'Ozzy Osbourne et de sa famille, The Osbournes, est diffusée sur la chaîne musicale MTV. Elle fait découvrir au grand public cette figure du monde du metal.

John Michael „Ozzy“ Osbourne (* 3. Dezember 1948 in Birmingham-Aston, England; † 22. Juli 2025 in Jordans, England) war ein britischer Rockmusiker. Bekannt wurde er als Lead-Sänger der Heavy Metal prägenden Band Black Sabbath. Als Solokünstler erreichte er ab 1980 bis Mitte der 1990er Jahre mehrere Platinauszeichnungen. Er trug die Beinamen Godfather of Metal („Pate des Metal“) und Prince of Darkness („Fürst der Finsternis“). Gemeinsam mit seiner Frau und Managerin Sharon Osbourne gründete er 1996 das Ozzfest.

David C. Giuntoli (born June 18, 1980) is an American actor. He's best known for his roles as Det. Nick Burkhardt on NBC's supernatural drama Grimm (2011–2017), and Eddie Saville on ABC's drama A Million Little Things (2018–2023). He has appeared in films such as 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi (2016) and Buddymoon (2016).

He first gained attention as a participant on MTV's Road Rules: South Pacific, and later on Real World/Road Rules Challenge: The Gauntlet. In 2007, he moved to Los Angeles, CA to pursue an acting career. He has appeared on several TV series including Nip/Tuck, Veronica Mars, Grey's Anatomy, Ghost Whisperer, Privileged, Without a Trace, and Cold Case, among others. He also hosted AT&T U-Verse "Buzz". His music career has not been as successful, but he has performed with German DJ Flula Borg, his occasional co-host on "Buzz," at The Viper Room in Los Angeles.

He married his Grimm co-star, actress Elizabeth Tulloch in June 2017. They have a daughter, Vivian, who was born in February 2019.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

大卫·君图力（出生于 1980 年 6 月 18 日）是一名美国演员。他最出名的角色是侦探。美国国家广播公司的超自然电视剧《格林》（Grimm 2011-2017 年）中的尼克·伯克哈特，美国广播公司的戏剧《一百万件小事》（A Million Little Things 2018-2023 年）中的埃迪·萨维尔。他曾出演电影，如《13 小时：班加西的秘密士兵》（13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi 2016 年）和《巴迪蒙》（Buddymoon 2016 年）。

他最初是作为 MTV 的《道路规则：南太平洋》（Road Rules: South Pacific）的参与者获得关注，后来是《真实世界/道路规则挑战：挑战》（Real World/Road Rules Challenge: The Gauntlet）。2007 年，他搬到加利福尼亚州洛杉矶从事演艺事业。他出演了几部电视剧，包括《Nip/Tuck》、《维罗妮卡·马斯》（Veronica Mars）、《格雷的解剖学》（Grey's Anatomy）、《鬼语者》（Ghost Whisperer）、《特权》（Privileged）、《无影无踪》（Without a Trace）和《冷案》（Cold Case）等。他还主持了 AT&T U-Verse 的《嗡嗡声》（Buzz）。他的音乐生涯并不那么成功，但他曾与德国 DJ 弗卢拉·博格（Flula Borg）一起在洛杉矶的毒蛇室演出，弗卢拉·博格是他偶尔在《嗡嗡声》中的共同主持人。

他于 2017 年 6 月与他的格林搭档、女演员伊丽莎白·图诺奇（Elizabeth Tulloch）结婚。他们有一个女儿薇薇安，她出生于 2019 年 2 月。

来自维基百科，自由的百科全书。

Anne Azoulay, née le 23 mars 1978 à Paris, est une actrice française.

Anne Azoulay se fait remarquer en 2002 pour le rôle de Carole Barthoulot dans Adieu pays, premier long-métrage de Philippe Ramos, pour lequel elle est sélectionnée au prix Michel-Simon et pré-sélectionnée pour le César du meilleur espoir féminin aux César 2003.

En 2002, elle incarne également Agnès dans la cinquième saison de la série Une famille formidable. Elle reprend le rôle joué par l'actrice Florence Loiret-Caille dans la précèdente saison. Toutes deux se retrouveront en 2018 dans la série Le Bureau des légendes.

En 2010, elle coécrit Léa, film réalisé en 2011 par Bruno Rolland, dans lequel elle tient le rôle principal. Son interprétation lui vaut d'être à nouveau pré-sélectionnée pour le César du meilleur espoir féminin aux César 2012.

En 2011, elle joue dans L'Exercice de l'État de Pierre Schoeller, film présenté au Festival de Cannes 2011 en sélection officielle Un certain regard.

En 2012, elle joue aux côtés de Gilbert Melki dans la seconde saison de Kaboul Kitchen, une création originale à succès de Canal+ (FIPA d'or 2012 de la meilleure série et du meilleur scénario).

En 2013, elle tient le rôle de Charlotte Ségur dans Témoin muet, troisième épisode de la deuxième saison de la série Les Petits Meurtres d'Agatha Christie.

Source: Article "Anne Azoulay" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Akhtar is known for the bumbling Muslim extremist Faisal in Chris Morris's film Four Lions. Other comedic performances include Gupta in The Angelos Epithemiou Show, Maroush in The Dictator and Smee in Joe Wright and Pan.

Akhtar has also won acclaim for his dramatic performances: in 2015, he was nominated for a BAFTA for Best Supporting Actor for his 2014 role as Wilson Wilson on Channel 4's Utopia. He played shopkeeper Ahmed alongside Toby Jones in the BBC mini-series Capital, and DS Ira King in the BBC's River. Reviewing River in The Daily Telegraph, Michael Hogan wrote, "This series was beautifully written by Abi Morgan, stylishly directed, and most of all, superbly acted. The quieter, less showy supporting players also shone. Not just stalwarts [...] but fresher faces: Adeel Akhtar as River's endlessly patient sidekick and Georgina Rich as his psychiatrist".

In 2016 Akhtar appeared as Shahzad in the BBC one-off drama Murdered by My Father. He won the 2017 BAFTA award for Lead Actor for this role, the first non-white actor to do so. He also appeared as Rob Singhal in the acclaimed BBC miniseries based on John le Carré's The Night Manager.

Adeel became a patron of Half Moon Theatre in autumn 2016.

​Rosalind Chao (born September 23, 1959) is an American actress of Chinese heritage. Chao's most notable roles are as South Korean refugee Soon-Lee Klinger on CBS' AfterMASH, as Keiko O'Brien on both Star Trek: The Next Generation and Star Trek: Deep Space Nine, Dr. Kim on The O.C., Rose Hsu Jordan in The Joy Luck Club (1993), and Hua Li, Mulan’s mother, in the live-action version of Mulan (2020). Chao is married to voice actor Simon Templeman; they have 2 children.

She began acting at the age of five in a California-based Peking opera traveling company at the instigation of her parents who were already heavily involved, and during the summers they sent her to Taiwan to further develop her acting skills. As a child, she played the daughter of a laundry owner (played by James Hong) on the 1970 episode of Here's Lucy entitled "Lucy the Laundress".

For some time, Chao worked at Disneyland as an international tour guide.

Deciding not to pursue acting, Chao enrolled in the communications department at the University of Southern California where she earned her degree in journalism. However, after spending a year as a radio newswriting intern at the CBS-owned Hollywood radio station KNX, she soon returned to acting.

Her big break was with the role of Soon-Lee, a South Korean refugee, in the final episodes of the TV series M*A*S*H. Soon-Lee married longtime starring character Maxwell Klinger (Jamie Farr) in the series finale "Goodbye, Farewell and Amen", the most-watched U.S. sitcom television episode of all time as of 2021. Chao continued playing the character in the M*A*S*H sequel series: AfterMASH (1983), her first role billed at co-starring status.

Chao regularly portrayed the Japanese exo-botanist Keiko Ishikawa O'Brien on both Star Trek: The Next Generation and Star Trek: Deep Space Nine. She was also originally considered for the part of Enterprise security chief Tasha Yar.

She's had recurring roles as Miss Chung on season 5 of Diff'rent Strokes, Li Ying on season 5 of Falcon Crest, Dr. Judith Lin on Citizen Baines, Dr. Kim on seasons 1 & 3 of The O.C., Pastor Jin on Don't Trust the B---- in Apartment B, Mrs. Wu on Sin City Saints, Caroline on Better Things, and Tina Tchen on The First Lady.

She's guest starred on numerous shows including This is Us, Code Black, The Catch, black-ish, The OA, Hawaii Five-O, Castle, Forever, Law & Order: Criminal Intent, Bones, The Event, CSI, Private Practice, Grey's Anatomy, According to Jim, Six Feet Under, The Parkers, Monk, Without a Trace, Dharma & Greg, Once and Again, The West Wing, Family Law, ER, Brimstone, Chicago Hope, Murder She Wrote, thirty something, Jake & the Fatman, Miami Vice, Beauty and the Beast (1988), The A-Team, St. Elsewhere, Riptide, M*A*S*H,One Day at a Time (1981), Emergency!, The Incredible Hulk (1978), Here's Lucy, and more.

She has starred in several movies including The Joy Luck Club, North (1994), What Dreams May Come, Impostor, I Am Sam, Freaky Friday (2003), Just Like Heaven, Mulan (2020) as Mulan’s mother, Together Together, and The Starling.

In 2019, Chao was invited to join the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences citing her contributions to critically acclaimed films The Joy Luck Club and I Am Sam.
data.name: Rosalind Chao

data.biography:
Rosalind Chao (* 23. September 1957) ist eine amerikanische Schauspielerin chinesischer Herkunft. Chaos bekannteste Rollen sind die des südkoreanischen Flüchtlings ‚Soon-Lee Klinger‘ in CBS' „AfterMASH“, ‚Keiko O'Brien‘ in „Star Trek: The Next Generation“ und „Star Trek: Deep Space Nine“, ‚Dr. Kim‘ in „The O.C.“, ‚Rose Hsu Jordan‘ in „The Joy Luck Club“ (1993) und „Hua Li‘, Mulans Mutter, in der Realverfilmung von „Mulan“ (2020). Chao ist mit dem Synchronsprecher ‚Simon Templeman‘ verheiratet; sie haben 2 Kinder.

Sie begann im Alter von fünf Jahren mit der Schauspielerei in einer in Kalifornien ansässigen Peking-Oper-Reisegruppe auf Betreiben ihrer Eltern, die bereits stark involviert waren und sie während der Sommer nach Taiwan schickten, um ihre schauspielerischen Fähigkeiten weiter zu entwickeln. Als Kind spielte sie die Tochter eines Wäschereibesitzers (gespielt von James Hong) in der 1970 erschienenen Folge von „Here's Lucy“ mit dem Titel „Lucy the Laundress“.

Eine Zeit lang arbeitete Chao in Disneyland als internationale Fremdenführerin.

Sie entschied sich gegen die Schauspielerei und schrieb sich an der ‚University of Southern California‘ im Fachbereich Kommunikation ein, wo sie ihren Abschluss in Journalismus machte. Nachdem sie jedoch ein Jahr als Praktikantin beim CBS-Radiosender KNX in Hollywood gearbeitet hatte, kehrte sie bald zur Schauspielerei zurück.

Ihr großer Durchbruch war die Rolle der ‚Soon-Lee‘, eines südkoreanischen Flüchtlings, in den letzten Folgen der Fernsehserie „MASH“. Soon-Lee heiratete den langjährigen Hauptdarsteller ‚Maxwell Klinger‘ (Jamie Farr) im Serienfinale „Goodbye, Farewell and Amen“, der meistgesehenen US-Sitcom-Folge aller Zeiten (Stand 2021). Chao spielte die Figur auch in der MASH-Fortsetzungsserie: „AfterMASH“ (1983), ihre erste Rolle, in der sie als Co-Hauptdarstellerin aufgeführt wurde.

Chao verkörperte regelmäßig die japanische Exo-Botanikerin ‚Keiko Ishikawa O'Brien‘ in „Star Trek: The Next Generation“ und „Star Trek: Deep Space Nine“. Ursprünglich war sie auch für die Rolle der Enterprise-Sicherheitschefin ‚Tasha Yar‘ vorgesehen.

Sie hatte wiederkehrende Rollen als ‚Miss Chung‘ in Staffel 5 von „Diff'rent Strokes“, ‚Li Ying‘ in Staffel 5 von „Falcon Crest“, ‚Dr. Judith Lin‘ in „Citizen Baines“, ‚Dr. Kim‘ in den Staffeln 1 & 3 von „The O.C.“, ‚Pastor Jin‘ in „Apartment 23“, ‚Mrs. Wu‘ in „Sin City Saints“, ‚Caroline‘ in „Better Things“ und ‚Tina Tchen‘ in „The First Lady“.

Sie hatte Gastauftritte in zahlreichen Serien wie „This is Us“, „Code Black“, „Hawaii Five-O“, „Castle“, „Bones“, „Grey's Anatomy“, „Six Feet Under“, „Monk“, „Without a Trace“, „Dharma & Greg“, „ER“, „Brimstone“, „Chicago Hope“, „Miami Vice“, „Beauty and the Beast“ (1988), „The A-Team“, „ MAS*H“, „The Incredible Hulk“ (1978), „Here's Lucy“ und vielen mehr.

Sie hat in mehreren Filmen mitgespielt, darunter „The Joy Luck Club“, „North“ (1994), „What Dreams May Come“, „Impostor“, „I Am Sam“, „Freaky Friday“ (2003), „Just Like Heaven“, „Mulan“ (2020) als Mulans Mutter, „Together Together“ und „The Starling“.

Im Jahr 2019 wurde Chao aufgrund ihrer Beiträge zu den von der Kritik gefeierten Filmen „The Joy Luck Club“ und „I Am Sam“ in die ‚Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences‘ aufgenommen.

赵家玲（Rosalind Chao）在美国加州出生，因为她的父母都是京剧票友，她也在京剧中客串演出，因而被星探发现，在多个电视片集及广告中客串演出，当时她只有七岁。她在南加州大学毕业后，在电视片集《军营杏林》（M．A．S．H．）中客串，其后她在《星空奇遇记》电视片集中演出。她演出的电影包括《蜘蛛侠》（The Amazing Spiderman，1977）、《以牙还牙》（An Eye For An Eye，1981）、《千金》（又名《移民足迹》、《金山梦》）（Thousand Pleces of Gold，1991）、《隐形怪杰》(Memories of On Invisible Man， 1992）、《喜福会》等。而她最满意的作品是《千金》。她还参演过国内由陈佩斯主演的喜剧片《少爷的磨难》。目前最新作品是《南京》(Nanking)（2007）。

Tawny Newsome é  música, comediante e atriz norte-americana mais conhecida por interpretar Chelsea Leight-Leigh no Bajillion Dollar Propertie $ e co-organizadora do podcast Yo, Is This Racist ?. Ela também é cantora da banda Four Lost Souls

Tawny Newsome (born February 24, 1983) - (Height 5 feet 10 inches (1.77 meters) in height) is an American musician, comedian, and actress. She is known for her roles as Chelsea Leight-Leigh on the Comedy Central series Bajillion Dollar Propertie$, Nina on The Comedy Get Down, and Beckett Mariner on the animated Star Trek series Star Trek: Lower Decks. She is also a co-host of the podcast Yo, Is This Racist?

Newsome was born in Vacaville, California, and grew up on a ranch. She attended DePaul University in Chicago, where she studied theater. After graduating, she began her comedy career with the Second City improv troupe.

Newsome's first major television role was as Chelsea Leight-Leigh on Bajillion Dollar Propertie$. She also had a recurring role as Nina on The Comedy Get Down. In 2020, she began voicing the character of Beckett Mariner on Star Trek: Lower Decks.

Newsome is also a musician and is a member of the band Four Lost Souls. She is also a co-host of the podcast Yo, Is This Racist? alongside Andrew Ti.
data.name: Tawny Newsome

Toks Olagundoye, whose full name is Olatokunbo Susan Olasobunmi Abeke Olagundoye, was born on September 16, 1975, in Lagos, Nigeria. She holds Nigerian nationality and has a diverse educational background, having attended schools in Nigeria, Switzerland, and England before completing high school in England. She later earned a Bachelor of Fine Arts in Theatre from Smith College in the USA.

Olagundoye is widely recognized for her roles in popular TV series such as "The Neighbors," where she played Jackie Joyner-Kersee, "Castle," portraying Hayley Shipton, and "Frasier," where she took on the role of Olivia Finch. In addition to her live-action roles, she has lent her voice to animated characters, including Nanefua Pizza in "Steven Universe" and Mrs. Beakley in "DuckTales." Her career also spans writing and producing, showcasing her multifaceted talents in the entertainment industry.

Toks Olagundoye's heritage is a blend of Norwegian and Nigerian, with her mother being Norwegian and her father Nigerian. She has been married to actor Sean Quinn since 2015, and together they have one child.
data.name: Toks Olagundoye

data.biography:
Olatokunbo Susan Olasobunmi Abeke „Toks“ Olagundoye (* 16. September 1975 in Lagos, Nigeria) ist eine nigerianische Schauspielerin, Autorin und Produzentin. Bekannt wurde sie durch die Fernsehserien „Castle“ und „The Neighbors“.

Olagundoye wurde in Lagos, Nigeria geboren. Sie hat eine norwegische Mutter und einen nigerianischen Vater. In ihrer Kindheit wurde sie in Nigeria, der Schweiz und in England unterrichtet. Sie schloss ein Studium am Smith College in Bachelor of Fine Arts in theatre ab.

Olagundoye gab ihr TV-Debüt im Jahr 2002, im selben Jahr war sie auch erstmals auf der Kinoleinwand zu sehen. Olagundoye hatte Gastrollen in „Ugly Betty“, „Law & Order“, „CSI: NY“, „Switched at Birth“, „NCIS: Naval Criminal Investigative Service“ und „Prime Suspect“.

2012 wurde Olagundoye für die Sitcom „The Neighbors“ gecastet.

Olagundoye war ab 2015 fester Bestandteil des Casts der Krimiserie „Castle“, in der sie die Rolle der ‚Hayley Shipton‘ spielte.

Seit dem 16. Mai 2015 ist ‚Toks‘ mit ‚Sean Quinn‘, den sie auf Twitter kennengelernt hatte, verheiratet.

(Quelle: Wikipedia)

data.name: トクス・オラガンドアイ

Sanaa McCoy Lathan (/səˈnɑ/ born September 19, 1971) is an American stage, film, television, and voice actress. She is the daughter of actress Eleanor McCoy and film director Stan Lathan. She earned bachelor's degree in English from University of California, Berkeley, and a master's degree in drama from Yale.

She is best known for her roles as Robyn in The Best Man films and subsequent TV miniseries on Peacock, Naomi Hicks on Netflix's Hit & Run, Violet Jones in Nappily Ever After, Ashe Akino on Fox's drama Shots Fired, Deputy Director Natalie Austin in Now You See Me 2 (2016), Leah Vaughn in The Perfect Guy (2015), Jenelle Wilson on Showtime's drama The Affair, Mona Fredricks on Starz' drama Boss, Andrea in Tyler Perry's The Family That Preys (2008), Beneatha Younger in ABC's film adaptation of A Raisin in the Sun (2008), Kenya McQueen in Something New (2006), Ann Merai Harrison in Out of Time (2004), Sidney 'Sid' Shaw in Brown Sugar (2002), Monica Wright in Love & Basketball (2000), Zora Banks in Disappearing Acts (2000), Alicia in The Wood (1999), Vanessa Brooks - the mother of Wesley Snipes' title character - in Blade (1998), and Briana Gilliam on NBC's sitcom Lateline.

She had recurring roles on HBO's Succession and FX's Nip/Tuck, and starred on NBC's short-lived sitcom Built to Last. In 2022, she received a nomination for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama Series, for her work on the television series Succession.

Her other movie credits include With/In Vol 1 (2021) and Vol 2 (2022), American Assassin (2017), Contagion (2011), Powder Blue (2009), AVP: Alien vs. Predator (2004), and more. She voiced Catwoman on HBO's animated series Harley Quinn, and Donna Tubbs on The Cleveland Show and on all Family Guy appearances.

In 2004, she starred on Broadway as Beneatha Younger in A Raisin in the Sun with Sean Combs, Audra McDonald, and Phylicia Rashad, and received a Tony Award nomination for Best Performance by a Featured Actress. She later reprise her role in the 2008 film adaptation. In 2010, she starred in the all-black performance of Cat on a Hot Tin Roof at the Novello Theatre in London.

She earned a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama Series for her recurring role on Succession. She received an NAACP Image Award Nomination for Outstanding Actress in a Motion Picture for her performance in Brown Sugar. She received a NAACP Image Award nomination for her performance in The Best Man. She earned an Essence Award for Best Actress for her performance in Disappearing Acts. She earned the 2001 NAACP Image Award for Outstanding Actress in a Motion Picture, an Independent Spirit Award nomination for Best Actress, and a BET Award for her performance in Love & Basketball.

In 2000, she was named by Ebony magazine as one of its 55 Most Beautiful People and was honored by Essence magazine and Black Entertainment Television.

In 2022, she made her directorial debut with the film On the Come Up, in which she also has a supporting role.
data.name: Sanaa Lathan

data.biography:
Sanaa McCoy Lathan (ur. 19 września 1971 w Nowym Jorku, USA) – amerykańska aktorka.

Córka Stana Lathana, producenta telewizyjnego, i Eleanor McCoy, aktorki i tancerki. Uczyła się w Manhattan Center for Science and Mathematics. Ukończyła anglistykę na University of California w Berkeley. Rozważała karierę prawniczki, jednak ostatecznie zapisała się na Yale School of Drama.

出生于1971年9月19日，是美国舞台、电影、电视和配音演员。她是女演员埃莉诺·麦考伊（Eleanor McCoy）和电影导演斯坦·莱森（Stan Lathan）的女儿。她在加州大学伯克利分校获得英语学士学位，在耶鲁大学获得戏剧硕士学位。

她最出名的角色是在《伴郎》电影和随后的电视迷你剧《孔雀》中饰演罗宾，在Netflix的《肇事逃逸》中饰演娜奥米·希克斯，在《从此以后》中饰演维奥莱特·琼斯，在福克斯电视剧《开枪》中饰演阿什·阿基诺，在《现在你看见我2》（2016）中饰演副导演娜塔莉·奥斯汀，在《完美家伙》（2015）中饰演莉亚·沃恩。 珍妮尔·威尔逊（Jenelle Wilson）在Showtime的电视剧《外遇》（The Affair）中，莫娜·弗雷德里克斯（Mona Fredricks）在斯塔兹（Starz）的电视剧《老板》（Boss）中，安德里亚（Andrea）在泰勒·佩里（Tyler Perry）的《捕食者》（2008）中，贝妮莎·杨格（Beneatha Younger）在ABC的电影改编的《阳光下的葡萄干》（2008）中，肯尼亚·麦昆（Kenya McQueen）在《新事物》（2006）中，安·梅莱·哈里森（Ann Merai Harrison）在《超时空》（2004）中，西德尼·西德·肖（Sidney 'Sid' Shaw）在《红糖》（2002）中， 莫妮卡·赖特（Monica Wright）在《爱情与篮球》（Love & Basketball，2000年）中，佐拉·班克斯（Zora Banks）在《消失的行为》（Disappearing Acts，2000年）中，艾丽西亚（Alicia）在《森林》（The Wood，1999年）中，凡妮莎·布鲁克斯（Vanessa Brooks）在《刀锋战士》（Blade，1998年）中饰演韦斯利·斯奈普斯（Wesley Snipes）的主角，以及NBC情景喜剧《Lateline》中的布莱安娜·吉列姆（Briana Gilliam）。

她在 HBO 的 Succession 和 FX 的 Nip/Tuck 中反复扮演角色，并出演了 NBC 短命的情景喜剧 Built to Last。2022 年，她因在电视连续剧《继承》中的工作而获得黄金时段艾美奖剧情类剧集杰出客串女演员提名。

她的其他电影作品包括 With/In Vol 1 （2021） 和 Vol 2 （2022）、American Assassin （2017）、Contagion （2011）、Powder Blue （2009）、AVP： Alien vs. Predator （2004） 等。她在 HBO 的动画系列《哈莉·奎因》中为猫女配音，在《克利夫兰秀》和所有《全家福》中为唐娜·塔布斯配音。

2004年，她与肖恩·库姆斯（Sean Combs）、奥德拉·麦克唐纳（Audra McDonald）和菲利西亚·拉沙德（Phylicia Rashad）一起在百老汇出演了《阳光下的葡萄干》（A Raisin in the Sun），并获得了托尼奖最佳女主角表演提名。她后来在 2008 年的电影改编中重新扮演了她的角色。2010年，她在伦敦诺韦洛剧院出演了全黑表演《热铁皮屋顶上的猫》。

她因在《继承》中的反复角色而获得了黄金时段艾美奖剧情类剧集杰出客座女演员奖。她因在《红糖》中的表演而获得全国有色人种协进会电影杰出女演员形象奖提名。她因在《最佳男人》中的表演而获得全国有色人种协进会形象奖提名。她因在《消失的行为》中的表演而获得了精华奖最佳女演员奖。她获得了2001年全国有色人种协进会电影杰出女演员形象奖，独立精神奖最佳女演员提名，以及她在《爱情与篮球》中的表演。

2000 年，她被 Ebony 杂志评为 55 位最美丽的人之一，并被 Essence 杂志和 Black Entertainment Television 授予荣誉。

2022 年，她凭借电影《On the Come Up》首次亮相，并在其中担任配角。
data.name: 桑娜·莱瑟

出生於 1971 年 9 月 19 日，是美國舞台、電影、電視和配音演員。她是女演員埃莉諾·麥考伊（Eleanor McCoy）和電影導演斯坦·萊森（Stan Lathan）的女兒。她在加州大學伯克利分校獲得英語學士學位，在耶魯大學獲得戲劇碩士學位。

她最出名的角色是在《伴郎》電影和隨後的電視迷你劇《孔雀》中飾演羅賓，在 Netflix 的《肇事逃逸》中飾演娜奧米·希克斯，在《從此以後》中飾演維奧萊特·瓊斯，在福克斯電視劇《開槍》中飾演阿什·阿基諾，在《現在你看見我 2》（2016）中飾演副導演娜塔莉·奧斯汀，在《完美傢夥》（2015）中飾演莉亞·沃恩。

珍妮爾·威爾遜（Jenelle Wilson）在 Showtime 的電視劇《外遇》（The Affair）中，莫娜·弗雷德里克斯（Mona Fredricks）在斯塔茲（Starz）的電視劇《老闆》（Boss）中，安德里亞（Andrea）在泰勒·佩裏（Tyler Perry）的《捕食者》（2008）中，貝妮莎·楊格（Beneatha Younger）在 ABC 的電影改編的《陽光下的葡萄乾》（2008）中，肯亞·麥昆（Kenya McQueen）在《新事物》（2006）中，安·梅萊·哈里森（Ann Merai Harrison）在《超時空》（2004）中，西德尼·西德·肖（Sidney 'Sid' Shaw）在《紅糖》（2002）中， 莫妮卡·賴特（Monica Wright）在《愛情與籃球》（Love & Basketball，2000 年）中，佐拉·班克斯（Zora Banks）在《消失的行為》（Disappearing Acts，2000 年）中，艾麗西亞（Alicia）在《森林》（The Wood，1999 年）中，凡妮莎·布魯克斯（Vanessa Brooks）在《幽靈刺客》（Blade，1998 年）中飾演韋斯利·斯奈普斯（Wesley Snipes）的主角，以及 NBC 情景喜劇《Lateline》中的布萊安娜·吉列姆（Briana Gilliam）。

她在 HBO 的 Succession 和 FX 的 Nip/Tuck 中反覆扮演角色，並出演了 NBC 短命的情景喜劇 Built to Last。2022 年，她因在電視聯續劇《遺密繼承人》中的工作而獲得黃金時段艾美獎劇情類劇集傑出客串女演員提名。

她的其他電影作品包括 With/In Vol 1 （2021） 和 Vol 2 （2022）、American Assassin （2017）、Contagion （2011）、Powder Blue （2009）、AVP： Alien vs.Predator （2004） 等。她在 HBO 的動畫系列《哈莉·奎因》中為貓女配音，在《克利夫蘭秀》和所有《全家福》中為唐娜·塔布斯配音。

2004 年，她與肖恩·庫姆斯（Sean Combs）、奧德拉·麥克唐納（Audra McDonald）和菲利西亞·拉沙德（Phylicia Rashad）一起在百老匯出演了《陽光下的葡萄乾》（A Raisin in the Sun），並獲得了託尼獎最佳女主角表演提名。她後來在 2008 年的電影改編中重新扮演了她的角色。2010 年，她在倫敦諾韋洛劇院出演了全黑表演《熱鐵皮屋頂上的貓》。

她因在《遺密繼承人》中的反覆角色而獲得了黃金時段艾美獎劇情類劇集傑出客座女演員獎。她因在《紅糖》中的表演而獲得全國有色人種協進會電影傑出女演員形象獎提名。她因在《最佳男人》中的表演而獲得全國有色人種協進會形象獎提名。她因在《消失的行為》中的表演而獲得了精華獎最佳女演員獎。她獲得了 2001 年全國有色人種協進會電影傑出女演員形象獎，獨立精神獎最佳女演員提名，以及她在《愛情與籃球》中的表演。

2000 年，她被 Ebony 雜誌評為 55 位最美麗的人之一，並被 Essence 雜誌和 Black Entertainment Television 授豫榮譽。

2022 年，她憑藉電影《On the Come Up》首次亮相，並在其中擔任配角。

data.biography:
Andy Lau Tak-Wah (Chinese: 劉德華, born 27 September 1961) is a Hong Kong Cantopop singer, actor, presenter, and film producer. Lau has been one of Hong Kong's most commercially successful film actors since the mid-1980s, performing in more than 160 films while maintaining a successful singing career at the same time. The media refer to Aaron Kwok Fu-Shing, Jacky Cheung Hok-Yau, Leon Lai Ming and him as the Cantopop Four Kings (四大天王).

For his contributions, a wax figure of Lau was unveiled on 1 June 2005 at the Madame Tussauds Hong Kong. He also entered into Guinness World Records for "Most Awards Won by a Cantopop Male Artist". By April 2000, he had already won a total unprecedented 292 awards.
data.name: Andy Lau

data.biography: 劉德華，BBS，MH，JP，香港演員、歌手及電影監製，1990年代獲封為香港樂壇「四大天王」之一，也是金氏世界紀錄大全中獲獎最多的香港歌手；電影方面他獲得三次香港電影金像獎最佳男主角和兩次金馬獎最佳男主角，至今參演超過140部電影。劉德華是天幕公司和映藝集團的創建者，作為投資人已參與製作了20多部華語電影。

data.biography:
Andy Lau Tak-wah, né le 27/9/1961 est un chanteur, acteur, présentateur et producteur de films originaire de Hong Kong. Il est l'un des plus grand succès commercial depuis le milieu des années 80 notamment grâce à sa participation à plus de 160 films. Malgré son succès en tant qu'acteur, Lau a su conserver une brillante carrière de chanteur.

Andy Lau Tak-wah entre au livre des records comme "Chanteur masculin de cantopop ayant gagné le plus de récompenses". En juin 2005, une statue de cire lui est dédiée au Musée de Madame Tussaud de Hong Kong.
data.name: Andy Lau

data.biography:
刘德华（Andy Lau），1961年9月27日出生于中国香港，籍贯广东新会，中国香港男演员、歌手、作词人、制片人。

1981年出演电影处女作《彩云曲》 。1983年主演的武侠剧《神雕侠侣》在香港获得62点的收视纪录 。1991年创办天幕电影公司。1992年，凭借传记片《五亿探长雷洛传》获第11届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角提名。1994年担任剧情片《天与地》的制片人。2000年凭借警匪片《暗战》获第19届香港电影金像奖最佳男主角奖。2004年凭借警匪片《无间道3：终极无间》获第41届台湾金马奖最佳男主角奖。2005年获得香港UA院线颁发的全港最高累积票房香港男演员”奖。2006年获得釜山国际电影节亚洲最有贡献电影人奖。2011年主演剧情片《桃姐》，并凭借该片获台湾金马奖最佳男主角奖、香港电影金像奖最佳男主角奖；担任第49届台湾电影金马奖评审团主席。2017年主演警匪动作片《拆弹专家》；获世界杰出华人奖。1985年发行首张个人专辑《只知道此刻爱你》。1990年凭借专辑《可不可以》在歌坛获得关注。1994年获得十大劲歌金曲最受欢迎男歌星奖。1995年在央视春晚上演唱歌曲《忘情水》。2000年被《吉尼斯世界纪录大全》评为“获奖最多的香港男歌手”。2004年第六次获得十大劲歌金曲最受欢迎男歌星奖。2016年参与填词的歌曲《原谅我》正式发行。

1994年创立刘德华慈善基金会。2000年被评为世界十大杰出青年。2005年发起亚洲新星导计划。2008年被委任为香港非官守太平绅士。2016年连任中国残疾人福利基金会副理事长
data.name: 刘德华

data.biography: Lưu Đức Hoa là nam diễn viên, ca sĩ và nhà sản xuất người Hồng Kông. Anh là một trong những diễn viên thành công nhất lịch sử nền điện ảnh châu Á, hiện đã thắng 292 giải thưởng và là một trong Tứ Đại Thiên Vương của Hồng Kông bên cạnh Trương Học Hữu, Quách Phú Thành và Lê Minh. Nhờ tài năng diễn xuất nổi bật, Lưu Đức Hoa được mệnh danh là "Ảnh đế". Anh còn là một trong những nghệ sĩ thành công về lĩnh vực âm nhạc tại thị trường Hoa ngữ.
data.name: Lưu Đức Hoa

data.biography:
Andy Lau Tak-wah divide sus carreras entre las actividades como actor, productor de cine, cantante y presentador de televisión. Activo desde los años ochenta, Andy Lau es considerado uno de las estrellas más famosas de Hong Kong.

Andy nació el 27 de septiembre de 1961 en la región rural de Taipo, en Hong Kong. Proveniente de una familia numerosa compuesta por seis hermanos, cuatro mujeres y dos hombres, durante su infancia tuvo que experimentar algunas dificultades económicas para salir adelante. Su casa no tenía agua corriente por lo que Andy, con sólo diez años, se levantaba cada día a las tres de la mañana para ir a buscar agua para su familia. Por suerte, sus padres siempre le animaron a continuar con sus estudios, ya que para ellos el futuro de sus hijos era lo más importante.

En 1980, tras graduarse de sus estudios, entró en la academia TVB de actores, donde estudió interpretación y artes marciales. Sus inicios fueron similares a los de muchos de sus compañeros, primero apareciendo en varias series de televisión para empezar a ser un rostro conocido por el público para más tarde debutar en el cine. En el caso de Andy, su primera película es Boat People, del 82. On the Wrong Track (1983) supuso su primer papel protagonista y su primer éxito. El éxito del film sumado a la fama que estaba obteniendo gracias a series como Return of Condor Heroes lo convirtieron en uno de los actores más populares del momento, llegando a ser uno de los 5 Tigers, nombre por el que se denominó a los cinco actores más prometedores de su generación. Junto a Andy los otros “tigres” fueron Tony Leung Chiu-Wai, Felix Wong, Miu Kiu-Wai y Ken Tong. La carrera del artista sufrió un importante traspiés en 1986. La TVB quiso blindar a uno de sus artistas más populares y le ofreció a Andy un contrato por cinco años más con ellos. Andy, que quería labrarse una carrera en el cine y no centrarse tanto en la televisión, lo rechazó, y la TVB se lo tomó tan a mal que lo incluyó en su lista negra e hizo todo lo posible para que Andy no volviera a salir por televisión. Este incidente podría haber supuesto el fin de su carrera como actor, pero afortunadamente tuvo la ayuda de su buen amigo Chow Yun-Fat quien lo ayudó cuando más lo necesitaba. Gracias a Chow Yun-Fat pudo hacerse un hueco en la industria cinematográfica y salir a flote. Los dos juntos aparecieron en Rich and Famous (1987), Tragic Hero (1987), God of Gamblers (1989) y God of Gamblers 2 (1981) entre otras y de esta manera Andy pudo dejar atrás la TVB y concentrarse en el cine.

data.biography: 香港出身。幼少期から芸能活動を開始し、1980年、香港の民放TV局TVBの俳優養成所に入所。卒業した82年、「望郷」で映画デビューを果たす。85年以降は歌手としても活躍。「いますぐ抱きしめたい」（88）や「ゴッド・ギャンブラー」（89）、「欲望の翼」（90）といった香港映画の話題作に続々出演し、人気と実力を兼ね備えたトップスターとして香港四天王のひとりに数えられ、日本でも人気を博した。91年には製作会社「天幕」を設立。以降はプロデュースにも乗り出し、「メイド・イン・ホンコン」（97）などで製作総指揮を手がけた。主演作「インファナル・アフェア」（02）は世界的大ヒットを収め、06年にハリウッドリメイクされた。近年の出演作にマット・デイモンと共演した「グレートウォール」（16）、製作も兼ねた「追龍」（17）などがある。
data.name: アンディ・ラウ

data.biography: Martin Patterson "Pat" Hingle (July 19, 1924 – January 3, 2009) was an American actor.Hingle was traditionally known for playing judges, police officers, and other authority figures. He was a guest star on the early NBC legal drama Justice, based on case histories of the Legal Aid Society of New York.
data.name: Pat Hingle

data.biography: Martin Patterson Hingle (* 19. Juli 1924 in Denver, Colorado; † 3. Januar 2009 in Carolina Beach, North Carolina) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler. Besondere Bekanntheit erreichte er an der Seite Clint Eastwoods, mit dem er drei Filme zusammen drehte, und mit der Rolle des Commissioner James Gordon in den vier Filmen der ersten Batman-Reihe.
马丁·帕特森（1924 年 7 月 19 日 - 2009 年 1 月 3 日）是一位美国演员。Hingle 传统上以扮演法官、警察和其他权威人物而闻名。他是NBC早期法律剧《正义》的客串明星，该剧改编自纽约法律援助协会的案例历史。
data.name: 马丁·帕特森

data.biography: 馬田·帕特遜·亨格（英語：Martin Patterson Hingle 1924 年 7 月 19 日 - 2009 年 1 月 3 日）是一位美國演員。Hingle 傳統上以扮演法官、警察和其他權威人物而聞名。他是 NBC 早期法律劇《劫後難逃》的客串明星，該劇改編自紐約法律援助協會的案例歷史。
data.name: 帕·亨格

data.biography:
Martin Patterson "Pat" Hingle, 19 Temmuz 1924 tarihinde Miami, Florida'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Ebeveynlerinin ayrılmasının ardından Teksas'ta büyüyen Hingle, II. Dünya Savaşı sırasında Amerikan Donanması'nda görev aldıktan sonra Teksas Üniversitesi'nde eğitim gördü. Oyunculuk tutkusu onu New York'a ve prestijli Actors Studio'ya götürdü. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında özellikle tiyatro sahnesinde parladı; Tennessee Williams'ın "Kızgın Damdaki Kedi" (Cat on a Hot Tin Roof) (1955) ve "Dark at the Top of the Stairs" (1957) gibi Broadway oyunlarının orijinal kadrolarında yer alarak tiyatro dünyasında saygın bir yer edindi.

Sinemadaki yükselişi, Elia Kazan'ın yönettiği "Aşk Bahçesi" (Splendor in the Grass) (1961) filminde Warren Beatty'nin baskıcı babasını canlandırmasıyla hız kazandı. Bu performans, onun kariyeri boyunca sıkça üstleneceği yargıç, polis şefi ve sert baba gibi otorite figürü rollerinin yolunu açtı. Clint Eastwood ile başrolü paylaştığı Western klasiği "Hang 'Em High" (1968) filmindeki Yargıç Fenton ve Sally Field ile oynadığı "Norma Rae" (1979) filmindeki performansları, karakter oyunculuğundaki ustalığını pekiştirdi. Stephen King uyarlaması "Maximum Overdrive" (1986) ve "The Grifters" (1990) gibi filmlerde de akılda kalıcı yan rollere imza attı.

Ancak Pat Hingle'ın popüler kültürdeki en bilinen ve en uzun soluklu rolü, DC Comics evreninin ikonik polis şefi Komiser James Gordon karakteridir. Tim Burton'ın "Batman" (1989) filminde bu rolü üstlenen Hingle, Gotham Şehri'nin yozlaşmışlığına karşı Batman ile işbirliği yapan emektar polis şefini canlandırdı. Bu rolü sadece ilk filmle sınırlı kalmadı; "Batman Dönüyor" (Batman Returns) (1992), "Batman Daima" (Batman Forever) (1995) ve "Batman ve Robin" (1997) filmlerinde de tekrarlayarak, Michael Gough (Alfred Pennyworth) ile birlikte 1989-1997 yılları arasındaki Batman serisinin dört filminde de rol alan sadece iki aktörden biri olma unvanını kazandı. Kariyerinin son dönemlerinde "Shaft" (2000) ve "Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby" (2006) gibi yapımlarda yer alarak altmış yılı aşkın kariyerini noktaladı.

Aktör, 3 Ocak 2009 tarihinde myelodisplazi (bir tür kan kanseri) teşhisi konulduktan kısa bir süre sonra 84 yaşında Carolina Beach, Kuzey Karolina'daki evinde hayatını kaybetmiştir.

Joseph "Joe" Viterelli (March 10, 1937 – January 28, 2004) was an Italian American actor known for his mafioso-orientated character roles.

Joe Viterelli was born to Italian immigrants in Bronx, New York. Before Viterelli became an actor, he was a successful businessman in New York City. He had befriended director Leo Penn (actor Sean Penn's father), who initially tried but failed to persuade Viterelli to pursue acting because of his unique and typically Italian looks. Some years later, Sean Penn approached Viterelli and asked him to try out for a part as a favor: Viterelli did and went on to appear in State of Grace and then in over 40 movies. Joe Viterelli became an icon of Mafia-Movies.

Viterelli died on January 28, 2004 in Las Vegas, Nevada due to a severe stomach hemorrhage, a complication of just-completed heart surgery. He was 66 years old. His last role was as a mobster in a 2004 Super Bowl ad for Staples, Inc. and his last movie role was as Jelly in Harold Ramis’ Analyze That.
data.name: Joe Viterelli

data.biography:
Joe Viterelli foi um ator ítalo-americano conhecido por interpretar mafiosos e gângsteres em filmes de Hollywood. Antes de sua carreira no cinema, trabalhou como empresário em Nova York e foi convencido pelo diretor Leo Penn a seguir a carreira de ator devido à sua aparência típica italiana.

Sua estreia no cinema foi em State of Grace (1990), e ele se destacou em papéis como Joe Profaci em Mobsters (1991), Nick Valenti em Bullets Over Broadway (1994), Tony "Two-Toes" em Eraser (1996), e Jelly em Analyze This (1999) e Analyze That (2002).

Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 2004, devido a complicações de uma cirurgia cardíaca, deixando sua esposa Catherine e cinco filhos.

元武、本名曹站永，1981年10月5日生于河北省邢台市，中国内地男演员。先后师从（孟和巴特尔）、于海，曾获全国青年武术比赛散打70KG级冠军，现为中国泰拳理事会会员，在海淀区经营一家私人泰拳武馆。三年的野战部队从军经历，使元武的骨子里透出一种军人的坚毅和果敢。近二十年的习武生涯，又使他多了一份常人难有的从䆟和霸气。曾出演《智取威虎山》《少林寺传奇》《虎踞龙盘》《倚天屠龙记》《跤王》《英雄时代》《西游记》等影视作品20余部。

2014年参演电影《智取威虎山》饰演“八大金刚老五秧子房”。2017年参演电影《寻味秘盗》饰演黑桃王。
data.name: 元武

data.biography:
元武、本名元武，1981 年 10 月 5 日生於河北省邢台市，中國內地男演員。先後師從（孟和巴特爾）、於海，曾獲全國青年武術比賽散打 70KG 級冠軍，現為中國泰拳理事會會員，在海澱區經營一傢俬人泰拳武館。三年的野戰部隊從軍經歷，使元武的骨子裏透出一種軍人的堅毅和果敢。近二十年的習武生涯，又使他多了一份常人難有的從䆟和霸氣。曾出演《智取威虎山》《少林寺傳奇》《虎踞龍盤》《倚天屠龍記》《跤王》《英雄時代》《西遊記》等影視作品 20 餘部。

2014 年參演電影《智取威虎山》飾演“八大金剛老五秧子房”。2017 年參演電影《尋味秘盜》飾演黑桃王。
data.name: 元武

data.biography:
Sergio Busquets Burgos (born 16 July 1988) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder and is the vice-captain of Barcelona and the Spain national team. Busquets is widely regarded as one of the greatest defensive midfielders of his generation, and by some to be among the finest of modern era.

A one-club man, he arrived in Barcelona's first team in July 2008, and eventually made a name for himself in a relatively short period of time. He reached the Spain national team less than one year after making his senior club debut.

Busquets helped Spain win the 2010 World Cup and the Euro 2012 tournaments. He also represented the nation at two other World Cups and Euro 2016.
data.name: Sergio Busquets
